creator: sblachmann@gmail.com
text:
unbound on FreeBSD seems unmaintained since 2 years, lots of bugs piling up :(

So apparently nobody has bothered yet to update unbound-checkconf from using default /usr/local/etc/unbound after somebody decided that unbound on FreeBSD uses /var/unbound instead.

For this reason unbound-checkconf fails unless one places a link from /etc/unbound to /var/unbound.

Can somebody please correct the hard-coded path in unbound-checkconf.c, so one no longer needs to set a link as quick workaround?
